sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55523" key="katafleci/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-φλεξίπολις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n55523.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inflamer of cities</tr_>, of a courtesan, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
